chapter_title.en: Chapter on Zihar (declaring one's Wife Unlawful Like a mother)

text: 4830 - وَ رُوِيَ: "أَنَّهُ إِذَا لَمْ يَقْدِرْ عَلَى اَلْإِطْعَامِ تَصَدَّقَ بِمَا يُطِيقُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4830 - It is narrated:
"If he is unable to provide the required feeding (it'ām), he should give charity (ṣadaqah) according to what he is capable of."
